title: MagicLinkToken
description: Single-use email tokens for customer_users magic-link auth (FEAT-056). Token is the random secret embedded in the email link; expires_at enforces TTL; used_at marks consumption. Tokens are deleted by a janitor pass after consumption + TTL window for audit.

token.description: URL-safe random secret. SHA-256 of underlying randomness recommended (do not store the raw secret if avoidable).

x-pb-indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_magic_link_token ON magic_link_tokens (token)
CREATE INDEX idx_magic_link_tenant_email ON magic_link_tokens (tenant_id, email)
